name: radioactivity_concentration_of_134I_in_air
description: "Radioactivity" means the number of radioactive decays of a material per second. "Radioactivity concentration" means radioactivity per unit volume of the medium. "I" means the element "iodine" and "134I" is the isotope "iodine-134" with a half-life of 3.61e-02 days.
